0.title: ActiveControllerCount
0.query:
timeseries active_controller_count = avg(cloud.aws.kafka.active_controller_count), by: { dt.entity.custom_device }
| fieldsAdd name=entityAttr(dt.entity.custom_device, "entity.name")
| sort arrayAvg(active_controller_count) desc
| limit 20

1.title: ActiveControllerCount Sum
1.query:
/*
Warning:
 - Rollup `value` is not supported in DQL.
*/
timeseries active_controller_count_sum = avg(cloud.aws.kafka.active_controller_count_sum), by: { dt.entity.custom_device }
| fieldsAdd name=entityAttr(dt.entity.custom_device, "entity.name")
| sort arrayAvg(active_controller_count_sum) desc
| limit 20
